shot_notes: The Scarecrow attempts to lubricate the jaw
evidence_summary: The Scarecrow performs mechanical maintenance on the Tin Woodman using an oil-can to resolve a speech impediment. The group transitions from high-stress panic regarding the Woodman's physical state to a moment of quiet resolution and renewed purpose.
The Scarecrow uses an oil-can to lubricate the Tin Woodman's jaw, restoring his ability to speak. The Woodman expresses a renewed vow to walk with extreme care to protect all living things.
High tension; Tin Woodman is unable to speak, causing frustration among the group.
Calm resolution; Tin Woodman speaks clearly and makes a vow.
The Scarecrow lubricates the Tin Woodman's jaw to restore speech.
